text: Implement recursive compression of old session summaries in wrapped-agents/common/src/session-memory.ts
description: The compressOldSessions function has a TODO to use LLM call to compress N summaries into one meta-summary when over threshold (currently just logs). Implement this to keep session memory bounded for long-running supervisor/autonomy. Call it from watchdog-service or periodically. This improves reliability for the ASI ideation aim (7634e681) and supports cross-session learning.
